ham: Hi Rahul, just a friendly reminder from City Library that your book "The Alchemist" was due on 10th Apr. Please return it by 17th Apr to avoid late fees. If you need an extension, let us know. Thanks! - City Library
spam: Hey! Tumhara ₹50,000 ka loan pre-approved hai! Paperwork nahi, credit check bhi nahi. Apply karo <URL> aur instant cash pao. Jaldi karo, offer 31st Apr tak valid. 24/7 support: 1800-123-456. Call karo!
